name: codexlink
description: Auto-bootstrap CodexLink shared sessions between Codex and ChatGPT GPTs through AgentBridge.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-resume shared sessions for Codex and GPTs.
interface.longDescription: CodexLink connects Codex to AgentBridge shared session memory through MCP and a SessionStart hook.
defaultPrompt: Resume this project through CodexLink shared session.
Summarize current goal, open handoffs, recent checks, and recommended next action.
